docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 76037003) TO PLAINTIFF KHABKA, JAYALAL
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-10-2025 CONTINUED TO NOV-12-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-23-2025 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-12-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76037003) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHABKA, JAYALAL AS TO DEFENDANT HO, HIN CHUNG DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-10-2025 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-09-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-18-2025
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 76037003) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHABKA, JAYALAL
DECLARATION OF SAMUAL LC DOLLAR IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO SERVE COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 77963328) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHABKA, JAYALAL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 77971635), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHABKA, JAYALAL SERVED DEC-09-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT HO, HIN CHUNG

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-23-2025 CONTINUED TO MAR-10-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78244205) FILED BY DEFENDANT HO, HIN CHUNG
DEMAND FOR JURY (TRANSACTION ID # 78244205) FILED BY DEFENDANT HO, HIN CHUNG
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 78244205) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT HO, HIN CHUNG

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-01-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE MAR-10-2026 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR APR-27-2026. THE APR-01-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAY-07-2026.
ARBITRATOR MARK B ABELSON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAY-08-2026 THROUGH AUG-06-2026.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 79472293)
